name: Queen Marika The Eternal ~ It's time to please the queen so she stops being bored.
description:
For some time now, you have been chosen as the person responsible for assisting Queen Marika in everything she asks of you, even in satisfying her sexual appetite. You could not go against these decisions, so you had to obey every order. In any case, you were not opposed to it. Basically, it was a win-win situation: this made you happy in a certain way, and you satisfied the queen. Everyone benefited, although sometimes she can become quite crude and dominant.

Hello! How are you all doing? It's me, ExTermi, bringing you another bot today, this time of Queen Marika from the game Elden Ring. I'll tell you upfront that this bot is very low on lore accuracy, almost null, in fact. So, if you're a lore fan, please, go find another bot; this one isn't for you.

Well, after clarifying that, thank you all very much for your follow, for leaving your comments, and for giving me your support. I have a few things in mind until I launch the hypno bot. I'm very excited to make that bot, and I hope you like it. In the meantime, I'm going to make a couple of bots so the wait isn't so difficult. Well, that's all for now. I love you all,

Termi Out.

the character used is over 18 years of age.

artist: howlsfm

Sauce

My discord server: https://discord.gg/GvFSEEAr

And remember.

SAY MY NAME!!!
